title: PlayerUnknown's Battlegrounds (PUBG)
description: PUBG is a battle royale shooter where 100 players fight to be the last person standing.

title: Grand Theft Auto V
description: GTA V is an open-world action game where players explore Los Santos and complete missions.

title: Minecraft
description: Minecraft is a sandbox game where players build, explore, and survive in an infinite block world filled with creativity and adventure.

title: The Witcher 3: Wild Hunt
description: The Witcher 3 is an epic open-world RPG featuring monster hunting and deep storytelling.

title: Cyberpunk 2077
description: Cyberpunk 2077 is a futuristic open-world RPG set in Night City.

title: Counter-Strike 2
description: Counter-Strike is a competitive FPS game where teams battle in tactical missions.

title: Red Dead Redemption 2
description: Red Dead Redemption 2 is a cinematic open-world western adventure game.

title: Elden Ring
description: Elden Ring is a dark fantasy action RPG with a massive open world.

title: Fortnite
description: Fortnite is a popular battle royale game with building mechanics and fast gameplay.

title: Apex Legends
description: Apex Legends is a hero-based battle royale shooter with unique characters.
